name: codex-linear-work-delegator
description: Local Linear issue delegator that claims work and spawns Codex only when needed.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run copy-assets && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.copy-assets: cp src/cli/help.txt dist/cli/help.txt && cp src/codex/prompt.md dist/codex/prompt.md && cp src/linear/queries/*.graphql dist/linear/queries/
